payload.title: Alfred S45 Complete — Ready for Scoring
payload.description: Session 45 addressed all 7 priorities from the S44 handoff. Key metrics: 100% skill invocation rate (6/6 applicable, all explicitly invoked via Skill tool). 4 PRs merged (#83-86). Nightwatch 15/15 (zero F401 errors). ADR-012 implemented (this inbox is the proof). Away-mode test partial (sentinel restart needed for watchdog code). n8n-mcp v2.44.0 installed.
